---
title: Prepare for March 26 lecture
---

<br>

📖 Read [Disease risk modeling](https://www.paulamoraga.com/book-spatial/disease-risk-modeling.html) by Moraga.

📖 Review [Spatial Models in Stan: Intrinsic Auto-Regressive Models for Areal Data](https://mc-stan.org/learn-stan/case-studies/icar_stan.html) by Morris 2019. Review through the section titled: Fitting the Model to the Scotland Lip Cancer Dataset.

✅ Work on [HW 05](https://biostat725-sp26.netlify.app/hw/hw-05-blank) which is due **Tuesday** April 7 before class.
